entity.summary: Non-custodial Ethereum token exchange that later shut down trading services while preserving post-shutdown withdrawal tools for deposited balances.
entity.notes: The current first-party root redirects to ForkDelta's shutdown notice. ForkDelta states that services stopped on 2022-12-15, no new orders or deposits are accepted, the trading interface is unavailable, and a withdrawal tool remains available for deposited balances. Stored as dead with voluntary_shutdown.

evidence.title: Sunsetting ForkDelta
evidence.notes: First-party shutdown notice states that ForkDelta stopped offering services on 2022-12-15, accepts no new orders or deposits, and no longer provides the trading interface.

evidence.title: ForkDelta withdrawal tool
evidence.notes: First-party post-shutdown withdrawal surface remains available for users to connect and withdraw deposited balances, corroborating terminal trading status with residual withdrawal functionality.

evidence.title: ForkDelta exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Completed exchange candidate corpus independently identifies ForkDelta as an exchange entity. HEI uses the first-party shutdown notice as the status authority rather than the stale active guess in registry discovery data.
